channel.title: Comments on: Social It v1.4 Released!

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/social-it-v1-4-released/#comment-759">Rafael</a>.
It has been added in the 1.5 version.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Rafael.

It has been added in the 1.5 version.

item.title: By: Rafael
item.dc:creator: Rafael
item.description:
Hi Gautam,
I like a lot your pluging. Is it possible to add the code and the image of meneame (www.meneame.net)? It is a Spanish Social Network, Thanks Rafael
item.content:encoded:
Hi Gautam,

I like a lot your pluging. Is it possible to add the code and the image of meneame (www.meneame.net)?
It is a Spanish Social Network,
Thanks
Rafael
